title: Thai Turkey Tacos
description: A fusion of Thai and Mexican flavors, this dish combines the juiciness of turkey with the spices of Thailand.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. In a small bowl, mix together melted buttery, coconut milk, fish sauce, and lime juice.
3. Brush the mixture on the turkey breast and cook for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, cook the sliced uruguayan chorizo in a skillet over medium heat until crispy.
5. Warm the tacos according to package instructions.
6. Slice the grilled turkey breast and assemble the tacos with chorizo, cilantro, and any desired toppings.
